name: When Cultures Move: Measuring and Improving Multicultural Text-to-Video Generation
summary: arXiv:2605.16716v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Text-to-video (T2V) generation has rapidly progressed in visual fidelity, yet its ability to faithfully represent multiple cultures within...
description: arXiv:2605.16716v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Text-to-video (T2V) generation has rapidly progressed in visual fidelity, yet its ability to faithfully represent multiple cultures within a single prompt remains underexplored. We introduce MAVEN, a multi-agent prompt refinement framework designed to improve cultural fidelity in both mono-cultural and cross-cultural T2V generation. MAVE...
author: Shuowei Li, Yuming Zhao, Parth Bhalerao, Oana Ignat
